subcodes.first_line: O thou son of the Kingdom! Thy letter has been received. It was like unto a bag of musk.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر ملکوت نامه ات رسید مانند نافه مشک بود چون باز نمودم رائحه محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @thankfulness; gratitude
